title: hydrocotyle indecora
intro: Hydrocotyle indecora, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. Hydrocotyle indecora is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, to promote overall well-being and prevent various diseases.
